subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, this servant hath undertaken to pen this letter with the utmost humility, inasmuch as the reply was delayed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی این عبد با کمال خجلت بتحریر این نامه پرداخت زیرا جواب شما تاخیر
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
